narrative.headline: Fuel and steering lead 2022 Ford Mustang complaints
narrative.summary: Owners filed 48 complaints with NHTSA for the 2022 Ford Mustang, and they are spread fairly evenly across several areas. Fuel System and Gasoline tie at the top with 8 reports each (17%), followed by Steering and the Electrical System at 7 each (15%), and the Fuel/Propulsion System at 6 (13%). Most reports describe no crash or fire, though Steering accounts for 1 crash and 1 injury. Buyers should pay close attention to the fuel system and steering before purchase.

issues.title: Fuel System
issues.blurb: Tied for the most reported area: 8 reports (17% of complaints), with no crashes or fires noted. Have the fuel system checked before buying.

issues.blurb: Also at the top with 8 reports (17% of complaints) and no crashes or fires noted. Worth reviewing alongside the fuel system.
